homepage.heroHeading: Your Data Has a Story. We Help You Read It.
homepage.heroSubtitle: Drop in any CSV or Excel file and get back a full AI-powered analysis — visualizations, patterns, anomalies, and a professional PDF report. No coding. No setup. Just an insightful report.
homepage.heroNote: No account needed for a one-time report. Create an account to save your results.
homepage.howItWorksStep1: Upload your dataset — CSV or Excel, up to 50MB.
homepage.howItWorksStep2: Our AI engine profiles your data, detects patterns, and generates charts.
homepage.howItWorksStep3: Download a clean, professional PDF report in seconds.
homepage.featuresTitle: Everything you need to understand your data
homepage.featuresSubtitle: Built for researchers, analysts, and students who want real insights — not just raw numbers.
homepage.feature1Desc: Automatically detects column types, missing values, outliers, and correlations. No configuration required — it just works.
homepage.feature2Desc: Goes beyond charts. Our AI writes a plain-English narrative explaining what your data means, what stands out, and what to watch out for.
homepage.feature3Desc: Use it as a guest for a quick one-time report, or create an account to save your results and come back anytime.
homepage.feature4Desc: An interactive chatbot walks you through your results — asking the right questions, flagging concerns, and helping you get the most out of your report.
homepage.feature5Desc: We save your last session automatically. Come back anytime to download your cleaned dataset, original file, or full PDF report — no need to re-upload.
homepage.securityIntro: Your data is handled with care at every step — from upload to report delivery.
homepage.securityBullet1: All data is transmitted over HTTPS — encrypted end to end.
homepage.securityBullet2: Files are processed in isolation and never shared with third parties.
homepage.securityBullet3: We use Supabase — a trusted, production-grade cloud database used by thousands of teams worldwide.
homepage.securityBullet4: Authentication is handled via industry-standard JWT tokens with secure password hashing.
homepage.securityBullet5: 50MB file size limit and strict file type validation enforced on every upload.
homepage.securityBullet6: Data quality warnings are surfaced transparently so you always know how reliable your results are.
homepage.securityBullet7: Built with security-conscious development practices — input validation, error handling, and safe API design throughout.
homepage.securityNote: Please do not upload confidential or legally sensitive data.
homepage.devIntro: We are a team of undergraduate Computer Science students at the University of Calgary — passionate about building AI-powered tools and active members of the UofC AI Club. This project was built as a showcase of what a small, driven team can create with modern full-stack development.
homepage.contactIntro: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.

auth.errorFirstName: First name must be letters only (max 30).
auth.errorLastName: Last name must be letters only (max 30).
auth.errorPasswordWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters and contain at least 1 number.

download.descNotStarted: Run the analysis to generate your report.
download.descNoDataset: Upload a dataset first to get started.

download.section0Desc: Row/column counts, data types, and a plain-language summary of your dataset.
download.section1Desc: Missing values, duplicates, and anomalies found — and how each was handled.
download.section2Desc: Distributions, outliers, skewness, and correlations with charts and explanations.
download.section3Desc: Natural language interpretation of patterns and trends written by the assistant.
download.section4Desc: Every transformation applied — dropped rows, filled nulls, renamed columns.
download.section5Desc: All charts embedded with captions: bar charts, heatmaps, scatter plots, trend lines.

help.doc0Summary: Upload a CSV file to get started with DIG analysis.
help.doc0Step0: Drag and drop your .csv file onto the Upload card, or click to browse your files.
help.doc0Step1: DIG supports files up to 50 MB. The file must be a valid comma-separated CSV.
help.doc0Step2: Once uploaded, DIG instantly shows a preview of the first 10 rows and 10 columns.
help.doc0Step3: Stats are calculated client-side: row count, column count, and missing value count.
help.doc0Step4: Upload time is captured the moment the file lands — this is stored server-side on upload, so it persists when you sign in later.
help.doc1Summary: Use the Analysis Assistant to clean your data and generate AI insights.
help.doc1Step0: After uploading a dataset, locate the Analysis Assistant card beside the upload.
help.doc1Step1: Press the bold Start button to begin the full analysis pipeline.
help.doc1Step2: The assistant will scan for data quality issues and prompt you with yes/no questions.
help.doc1Step3: Use Yes to approve a step, No to skip it, or Cancel to stop the pipeline entirely.
help.doc1Step4: Once all steps complete, a 'Report Ready' banner appears — click it to jump to your report.
help.doc2Summary: Ask natural language questions about your data during analysis.
help.doc2Step0: The chat input is active during the Analysis phase only (after pressing Start).
help.doc2Step1: Type any question about your data and press Enter or the Send button.
help.doc2Step2: Examples: 'What columns have the most missing values?' or 'Summarise outliers in column A'.
help.doc2Step3: Use the Yes / No buttons to respond to prompts from the assistant instead of typing.
help.doc2Step4: Chat history is preserved for the current session.
help.doc3Summary: Your PDF report is a complete AI-generated analysis document.
help.doc3Step0: Once analysis completes, navigate to the Report & Exports section.
help.doc3Step1: Click Download PDF Report to save the full analysis document.
help.doc3Step2: You can also download the cleaned CSV, view the report online, or email it to yourself.
help.doc3Step3: The PDF includes: data overview, quality analysis, statistical insights, AI commentary, cleaning log, and all visualisations.
help.doc3Step4: Each dataset generates its own report — re-run analysis on a new upload to get a fresh report.
help.helpCenterDesc: Click a topic below for a step-by-step guide.
help.contactSupportDesc: We typically reply within 1–2 business days.
